oils.usageNotes: Lye consumption estimate only — not an ISO 3657 triglyceride SAP. Value proxied from pine tar; composition varies by grade and supplier. Calculator may include in lye math or treat as a trace additive.

sources.notes: No published birch tar SAP in FNWL or ISO sources; proxy coefficient from pine tar for acid neutralization estimate
Pine tar reference entry: lye calc only, no fatty-acid profile (legacy catalog)
